Back PoolGuyPro

Terms of Use

Last updated: June 28, 2026

By accessing or using PoolGuyPro at usapoolmarket.com ("the App"), you agree to these Terms of Use. Please read them carefully.

1. About PoolGuyPro

PoolGuyPro is a marketplace platform connecting pool service professionals in Broward County, Florida. The App allows users to post and find listings, arrange vacation coverage, and communicate within the pool service industry.

2. Eligibility

  • You must be at least 18 years old to use the App
  • You must be a licensed pool service professional or a homeowner/HOA seeking pool services
  • You must provide accurate and truthful information during registration
  • One account per person — multiple accounts are not permitted

3. User Conduct

You agree not to:

  • Post false, misleading, or fraudulent listings
  • Harass, threaten, or abuse other users
  • Use the App for any illegal purpose
  • Attempt to bypass subscription restrictions or access features you have not paid for
  • Scrape, copy, or redistribute content from the App
  • Create fake accounts or impersonate other users

4. Listings and Content

You are solely responsible for the content you post, including job listings, route listings, and vacation coverage ads. PoolGuyPro reserves the right to remove any content that violates these Terms or that we deem inappropriate, without notice.

5. Subscriptions and Payments

PoolGuyPro offers free and paid subscription plans (PRO and PREMIUM). Paid subscriptions are processed by Stripe.

  • Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually as selected
  • You may cancel at any time — cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period
  • Refunds are not provided for partial periods, except where required by law
  • We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days' notice

PoolGuyPro uses the "Reader App" model: payments are processed on our website, not through app stores, to avoid third-party platform fees.

6. Ratings and Reviews

Users may rate each other after completed interactions. Ratings must be honest and based on real experiences. We reserve the right to remove ratings that appear fraudulent or abusive.

7. Disclaimers

PoolGuyPro is a marketplace platform — we do not employ pool service professionals, verify licenses, or guarantee the quality of work performed. All arrangements between users are independent contracts. We are not liable for any disputes, damages, or losses arising from user interactions.

8. Account Termination

We may suspend or terminate your account at any time for violations of these Terms, fraudulent activity, or repeated negative ratings indicating misconduct. You may also delete your account at any time from the Profile section of the App.

9. Intellectual Property

The PoolGuyPro name, logo, and app design are our intellectual property. You may not use them without written permission.

10. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, PoolGuyPro shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the App. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 3 months prior to any claim.

11. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida, United States. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Broward County, Florida.

12. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms at any time. We will notify you via the App or email. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

Questions? Contact us at felipelwo@gmail.com
